description: Slice a target 3D object with a clipping plane and expose the cut silhouette. Used to reveal internal geometry without disassembling.

expectedSourceShape.target: elementId of a 3D model element OR an inline mesh ref
expectedSourceShape.offset: metres along axis where the plane sits

silhouette.desc: draw a coloured outline along the cut edge

output: A single spatialElement with representationMode `three_d_model` that wraps the target with clipping enabled. Emits a sibling element with representationMode `guide_line` for the cut silhouette.

qualityBar.reference: Steering wheel center console, cut along Z at offset 0.0 — outer shell remains, PCB layer reads as a coloured ribbon along the cut edge.
qualityBar.notes: Use renderer.localClippingEnabled = true and set THREE.Plane on each material in the target's mesh subtree. Add a thin coloured tube along the visible cut for emphasis.
